---
title: "Réseau hydrographique SLSO — Planetary Computer"
author: "Essi Parent"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    toc: false
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  warning: false
  echo: true
---

Carte interactive du réseau dérivé automatiquement (Copernicus DEM 30m + GRHQ/OSM).
Couches : tronçons GRHQ, arêtes du réseau, noeuds, lacs, stations.

```{python}
#| label: setup
import os
os.chdir("C:/Users/parse01/documents-locaux/GitHub/meandre")

import json
from pathlib import Path

import duckdb
import folium
import matplotlib.cm as cm
import matplotlib.colors as mcolors
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import geopandas as gpd
from shapely import wkb as _wkb
```

```{python}
#| label: load-db
PC_DB        = Path("notebooks/slso/data/slso-od.duckdb")
REACH_PARQ   = Path("notebooks/slso/data/reaches_od.parquet")

con = duckdb.connect(str(PC_DB), read_only=True)
tables = [r[0] for r in con.execute("SHOW TABLES").fetchall()]

nodes_df = con.execute(
    "SELECT node_idx, node_id, lon, lat, CAST(is_lake AS BOOLEAN) AS is_lake, topo_order FROM nodes ORDER BY node_idx"
).df()

edges_df = con.execute(
    "SELECT src, dst, travel_time_days FROM edges"
).df()

stations_df = (
    con.execute("SELECT station_id, node_idx, lon, lat, drainage_area_km2 FROM stations").df()
    if "stations" in tables else pd.DataFrame()
)

con.close()

print(f"Noeuds : {len(nodes_df)}   Aretes : {len(edges_df)}   Stations : {len(stations_df)}")
print(f"Lacs   : {nodes_df['is_lake'].sum()}")
```

```{python}
#| label: load-reaches
_df = pd.read_parquet(REACH_PARQ)
reaches_gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    _df.drop(columns="geometry"),
    geometry=[_wkb.loads(g) for g in _df["geometry"]],
    crs="EPSG:4326",
)
# Join topo_order for styling
reaches_gdf = reaches_gdf.merge(
    nodes_df[["node_idx", "topo_order", "is_lake"]], on="node_idx", how="left"
)
print(f"Troncons charges : {len(reaches_gdf)}")
```

```{python}
#| label: build-map

# ── Colormap topo_order ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
topo_min = int(nodes_df["topo_order"].min())
topo_max = int(nodes_df["topo_order"].max())
_cmap = cm.get_cmap("PuBu")

def _topo_color(topo_order):
    t = (int(topo_order) - topo_min) / max(topo_max - topo_min, 1)
    return mcolors.to_hex(_cmap(t))

# ── Edge coords ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
_xy = nodes_df.set_index("node_idx")[["lon", "lat"]]
edges_df = edges_df.join(_xy.rename(columns={"lon": "lon_src", "lat": "lat_src"}), on="src")
edges_df = edges_df.join(_xy.rename(columns={"lon": "lon_dst", "lat": "lat_dst"}), on="dst")
edges_df = edges_df.dropna(subset=["lon_src", "lon_dst"])

edges_df["dist_km"] = np.sqrt(
    (edges_df["lon_src"] - edges_df["lon_dst"]) ** 2 +
    (edges_df["lat_src"] - edges_df["lat_dst"]) ** 2
) * 111.0
LONG_EDGE_KM = 20.0
long_edges_df = edges_df[edges_df["dist_km"] > LONG_EDGE_KM]
print(f"Aretes longues (> {LONG_EDGE_KM} km) : {len(long_edges_df)}")

# ── Carte ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
m = folium.Map(
    location=[nodes_df["lat"].mean(), nodes_df["lon"].mean()],
    zoom_start=9,
    tiles="CartoDB positron",
    prefer_canvas=False,
)

fg_reaches  = folium.FeatureGroup(name="Troncons GRHQ/OSM", show=True)
fg_edges    = folium.FeatureGroup(name="Reseau (aretes)", show=False)
fg_nodes    = folium.FeatureGroup(name="Noeuds", show=False)
fg_lakes    = folium.FeatureGroup(name="Lacs / reservoirs", show=True)
fg_stations = folium.FeatureGroup(name="Stations hydrometriques", show=True)

# ── 1. Tronçons GRHQ/OSM ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
_topo_lookup = nodes_df.set_index("node_idx")["topo_order"].to_dict()

reach_features = []
for _, row in reaches_gdf.iterrows():
    topo = row.get("topo_order", topo_min)
    if topo is None or (isinstance(topo, float) and np.isnan(topo)):
        topo = topo_min
    t_norm = (int(topo) - topo_min) / max(topo_max - topo_min, 1)
    reach_features.append({
        "type": "Feature",
        "geometry": row["geometry"].__geo_interface__,
        "properties": {
            "node_idx": int(row["node_idx"]),
            "is_lake":  bool(row.get("is_lake", False)),
            "color":    _topo_color(topo),
            "topo_norm": t_norm,
        },
    })

folium.GeoJson(
    {"type": "FeatureCollection", "features": reach_features},
    style_function=lambda f: {
        "color":   "#41b6c4" if f["properties"]["is_lake"] else f["properties"]["color"],
        "weight":  0.8 + 2.5 * f["properties"]["topo_norm"],
        "opacity": 0.85,
    },
    tooltip=folium.GeoJsonTooltip(
        fields=["node_idx"],
        aliases=["Noeud #"],
    ),
).add_to(fg_reaches)

# ── 2. Arêtes centroïd-à-centroïd ────────────────────────────────────────
_topo_order_lookup = nodes_df.set_index("node_idx")["topo_order"].to_dict()

edge_features = []
for _, row in edges_df.iterrows():
    src_topo = _topo_order_lookup.get(row["src"], topo_min)
    edge_features.append({
        "type": "Feature",
        "geometry": {
            "type": "LineString",
            "coordinates": [
                [float(row["lon_src"]), float(row["lat_src"])],
                [float(row["lon_dst"]), float(row["lat_dst"])],
            ],
        },
        "properties": {
            "src": int(row["src"]),
            "dst": int(row["dst"]),
            "travel_time": int(row["travel_time_days"]),
            "color": _topo_color(int(src_topo)),
            "topo_norm": (int(src_topo) - topo_min) / max(topo_max - topo_min, 1),
        },
    })

folium.GeoJson(
    {"type": "FeatureCollection", "features": edge_features},
    style_function=lambda f: {
        "color":   f["properties"]["color"],
        "weight":  0.5 + 2.0 * f["properties"]["topo_norm"],
        "opacity": 0.6,
    },
    tooltip=folium.GeoJsonTooltip(
        fields=["src", "dst", "travel_time"],
        aliases=["Amont", "Aval", "Transit (j)"],
    ),
).add_to(fg_edges)

# ── 3. Noeuds réguliers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
regular_nodes = nodes_df[~nodes_df["is_lake"]]
node_features = []
for _, row in regular_nodes.iterrows():
    node_features.append({
        "type": "Feature",
        "geometry": {"type": "Point", "coordinates": [float(row["lon"]), float(row["lat"])]},
        "properties": {
            "node_idx":   int(row["node_idx"]),
            "node_id":    str(row["node_id"]),
            "topo_order": int(row["topo_order"]),
            "color":      _topo_color(int(row["topo_order"])),
        },
    })

folium.GeoJson(
    {"type": "FeatureCollection", "features": node_features},
    marker=folium.CircleMarker(radius=2, fill=True, fill_opacity=0.7),
    style_function=lambda f: {
        "color":       f["properties"]["color"],
        "fillColor":   f["properties"]["color"],
        "fillOpacity": 0.8,
        "weight":      0,
        "radius":      2,
    },
    tooltip=folium.GeoJsonTooltip(
        fields=["node_idx", "topo_order"],
        aliases=["Noeud #", "Ordre topo"],
    ),
).add_to(fg_nodes)

# ── 4. Lacs ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for _, row in nodes_df[nodes_df["is_lake"]].iterrows():
    folium.CircleMarker(
        location=[float(row["lat"]), float(row["lon"])],
        radius=5,
        color="#225ea8",
        fill=True,
        fill_color="#41b6c4",
        fill_opacity=0.9,
        weight=1,
        tooltip=f"Lac — noeud {int(row['node_idx'])} | topo={int(row['topo_order'])}",
    ).add_to(fg_lakes)

# ── 5. Stations ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for _, row in stations_df.iterrows():
    folium.Marker(
        location=[float(row["lat"]), float(row["lon"])],
        icon=folium.Icon(color="red", icon="tint", prefix="fa"),
        tooltip=f"Station {row['station_id']} — noeud {int(row['node_idx'])}",
    ).add_to(fg_stations)

# ── Assemblage ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for fg in [fg_reaches, fg_edges, fg_nodes, fg_lakes, fg_stations]:
    fg.add_to(m)

folium.LayerControl(collapsed=False).add_to(m)

legend_html = f"""
<div style="position:fixed; bottom:30px; left:30px; z-index:1000;
            background:white; padding:10px 14px; border-radius:6px;
            box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); font-size:12px; line-height:1.8;">
  <b>Reseau SLSO — Planetary Computer</b><br>
  <b>Troncons</b> : bleu clair (tete) &rarr; bleu fonce (aval)<br>
  <span style="color:#41b6c4">&#9644;</span> Troncon lac / reservoir<br>
  <span style="color:#41b6c4">&#9679;</span> Lac / reservoir (noeud)<br>
  <span style="color:red">&#9679;</span> Station hydrométrique<br>
  {len(nodes_df)} noeuds &bull; {len(edges_df)} aretes &bull; {int(nodes_df['is_lake'].sum())} lacs
</div>
"""
m.get_root().html.add_child(folium.Element(legend_html))

m
```


```{python}

```
